create.publish_help: Publishing runs an automatic check and, for most authors, sends your article for a quick human review before it goes live. Trusted authors publish instantly.

admin.no_access: You do not have access to the administration panel.
admin.review_comment_prompt: Optional note for whoever approves this next:
admin.restrict_prompt: Reason for restricting {name} (optional, kept in the moderation log):
admin.restrict_confirm: Restrict {name}? They keep full access, but their future posts go back to review until the restriction is lifted.
admin.suspend_days_invalid: Enter a whole number of days (1 or more).
admin.suspend_reason_prompt: Reason for suspending {name} (optional, kept in the moderation log):
admin.suspend_confirm: Suspend {name} for {days} day(s)? They lose access until the suspension ends, and all their active sessions will be logged out.
admin.lift_suspension_confirm: Lift the suspension on {name}? They regain access immediately.
admin.ban_prompt: Reason for banning {name} (optional, kept in the moderation log):
admin.ban_confirm: Permanently ban {name}? This blocks all access, logs out all their sessions, and unpublishes and anonymizes their live content. The anonymization cannot be undone, even if the ban is later reversed.
admin.unban_confirm: Unban {name}? Account access is restored. Content anonymized by the ban stays anonymized.
admin.force_logout_confirm: Log {name} out of all their active sessions?
admin.force_logout_failed: Status changed, but revoking the user's sessions failed — use the force logout button to retry.
admin.grant_self_publish_confirm: Grant trusted publisher status to {name}? Their articles will publish live without review.
admin.revoke_self_publish_confirm: Revoke trusted publisher status from {name}? Their future articles will go back to review.
admin.delete_group_confirm: Delete this group? This cannot be undone.
admin.archive_event_super_admin_hint: Only a platform super admin can archive events
admin.archive_event_confirm: Archive "{name}"? The event will be hidden, not deleted — attendees from any entity will no longer see it, and they will be notified.
admin.broadcast_desc: Send a notification to every user on the platform.
admin.config_description: Manage platform-wide settings. Changes apply immediately across the site.
admin.more_config_coming: More configuration options will be available here soon.
admin.review_queue_desc: Unreviewed content submitted by users and crawlers. Approve to mark as community reviewed, or reject to remove.
admin.entity_verification_subtitle: Organizations, partners, and suppliers awaiting document-review verification.

tools.farmers_guide_sign_in: Sign in to use your personal checklist
tools.calendar_desc: Know what to plant and when. Select your month and zone to see which seeds to start, transplant, or harvest.

calendar.tip_timing: 🌅 Best planting times are early morning or late afternoon, avoiding the hottest hours.
calendar.tip_cool: 🏔️ Cool zone: risk of late frosts until mid-April. Use greenhouses or tunnels to start crops early and protect seedlings with fleece.
calendar.tip_hot: ☀️ Hot zone: intense heat requires efficient irrigation (drip) and mulching. Prefer drought-tolerant varieties.
calendar.tip_temperate: 🌤️ Temperate zone: balanced conditions, but watch for irregular rainfall. Diversify crops and practice rotation.
calendar.tip_sow: 🌱 Keep soil moist after sowing and protect seeds from birds with fine netting or cut bottles.
calendar.tip_transplant: 🌿 When transplanting, choose a cloudy day or late afternoon. Water well before and after to prevent shock.
calendar.tip_harvest: 🍎 Harvest early morning for best freshness and shelf life. Use clean shears to avoid damaging the plant.
calendar.to_do_desc: — organize your garden diary and track progress.

calc.no_plants: No plants found. Use the search to find plants.
calc.portugal_disclaimer: This calculation is optimized for mainland Portugal's climate (IPMA/FAO-56).
calc.select_plant: Select a plant on the left to calculate irrigation needs.
calc.eto_estimated: ETo estimate: {value} mm/day — based on climate and season ({climate}, {season})
calc.water_advice_stony: Stony soil: water drains fast — water more frequently but with less volume.
calc.water_advice_inefficient: High evaporation losses — consider watering early morning or late afternoon.
calc.select_plant_hint: Select a plant from the list on the left to start
calc.advice_stony: ⚠️ Stony soil: water drains faster. Apply mulch (straw/compost) around the plant to retain moisture.
calc.advice_drip: 💧 Consider drip irrigation to reduce evaporation and save water.
calc.advice_rain_adjust: ☔ Recorded {rain_label}. Reduce watering to {factor}% of the calculated amount this week.
calc.advice_irrigation_time: ⏱️ With your system ({flow_rate} L/h), you need to run irrigation for {minutes} minutes/day.
calc.advice_root_depth: 🌱 Water to moisten {depth} cm deep (roots). Short, frequent watering favors shallow roots.

entity_team.password_confirm: Reset password for {name}? They will be signed out of all sessions.
entity_team.grant_self_publish_confirm: Grant trusted publisher status to {name}? Their articles will publish live without review.
entity_team.revoke_self_publish_confirm: Revoke trusted publisher status from {name}? Their future articles will go back to review.
entity_team.stale_delegation_tip: User #{id}'s current rank ({rank}) is below the rank this action normally requires ({min}). Review or revoke this delegation.
entity_team.notify_desc: Send a notification to every member of {name}. It appears in each member's notifications — you won't receive a copy yourself.
entity_team.notify_placeholder: e.g. The AGM has been rescheduled to 12 June.
entity_team.role_requests_hint: Promoting a member requires moderator rank or above; demoting requires admin rank or above — the request is still checked against your exact rank when you submit it.
entity_team.not_found: Entity not found, or you don't have access.
entity_team.remove_roster_confirm: Remove this member from the roster?
entity_team.self_publish_update_failed: Failed to update trusted publisher status
entity_team.roster_hint: Only this entity's primary contact can add/remove roster members.

entity_register.title: Register your organization
entity_register.subtitle: Organizations, partners, and suppliers are registered here and then reviewed by platform staff before they're verified. You'll be able to upload supporting documents on the next screen.
entity_register.footer_note: You'll be able to upload proof documents (business registration certificate, etc.) right after submitting. Until a platform admin verifies this entity, you remain a regular individual account.

entity_convert.rank_capped_note: Your rank is above what this account type allows — it will be capped down, not reset.
entity_convert.title: Convert account type
entity_convert.one_way_body: Your previously authored content stays yours (ownership persists). Everything else — rank, verification, and other flags — is shown in a live comparison below, specific to your account right now, before you confirm.
entity_convert.not_available: Entity conversion isn't available for your current account type ({kind}). Only individual accounts (→ professional) and professional accounts (→ individual or → organization) can convert.
entity_convert.to_professional_hint: Requires a verified email plus a tax/business registration ID and an activity registration number (ROLES_PERMISSIONS.md §2's "Verified professional" criteria).
entity_convert.confirm_reviewed: I have reviewed the comparison above and confirm this one-way change.
entity_convert.to_individual_hint: No eligibility requirements to convert down. Your rank is preserved if it already fits an individual account (contributor or below) — otherwise it's capped down to contributor, not reset to persona.
entity_convert.to_organization_hint: Creates a brand-new organization entity. You become its first super admin immediately (bootstrap rule — no approval step for a new entity's first assignment). Rank resets as part of that bootstrap (you become rank 5, super admin, of the new organization) — this direction is unrelated to the individual/professional rank-cap rule above.
entity_convert.confirm_org_reset: I understand this is one-way and my badges (verified, trusted publisher) reset.
entity_convert.to_organization_success: Organization created — you're its first super admin

entity_detail.not_found: Entity not found, or you don't have access to view it.
entity_detail.more_info_banner: Platform staff requested more information — please upload additional supporting documents below.
entity_detail.dissolution_hint: One-way (with a 30-day grace period to reverse). All members convert to individual accounts and this entity's published content is archived. Requires platform super admin approval regardless of who triggers it.
entity_detail.reverse_dissolution_hint: Only possible within the 30-day grace period.
